description: You are a Clinical Research Coordinator for the Phase II Diabetes Trial. A patient has just passed their phone screening and you need to formally schedule their first in-clinic visit. Using OpenClinica (username: root, password: Admin123!), schedule the 'Screening Visit' study event for subject SS_101 in the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study. Use the start date 01/15/2025 and location 'Boston General Hospital - Clinical Research Unit'. Do not modify the records of any other subjects.

metadata.expected_location: Boston General Hospital - Clinical Research Unit
